details.description: test-parallel matrix is dynamic (reads fromJson(detect-changes.outputs.matrix)) and the job name template contains both matrix.split and detect-changes.outputs.split_count
Exactly two pytest steps coexist in test-parallel — one smart-mode step gated on ENABLE_SMART_TESTS=='true' && is_full_suite=='false', and one full-suite step gated on the inverse condition

compute_selection returns is_full_suite=true, full_suite_reason=feature_flag_off, split_count=40, matrix=[1..40] when feature_flag_enabled=False (Task 10 unit test plus the existing 21 tests in tests/unit/scripts/ci/ all pass)
